narrative:
Lindsey (precinct in Sandusky County) has 319 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
